surface_groups.heading: Entrypoint / Map
surface_groups.note: Open these first when the question is where to start or which public repo map or self-serve entrypoint should anchor the next read.

surface_groups.heading: Contribution / Policy
surface_groups.note: Use these when the question is how to contribute safely, publicly, and within the repo's current review posture.

surface_groups.heading: Walkthrough / Context
surface_groups.note: Use this when you need one concrete end-to-end example of how a real practice became a published technique here.

surface_groups.heading: Status / Release
surface_groups.note: Use these when the question is what changed, what is currently unreleased, and how the public release path is validated.
